note: The committed half of the outrospection feed. It is EMPTY on purpose: items here are real search results or nothing at all, never placeholder headlines. Populate it with `EXA_API_KEY=… npm run outrospect` (scripts/outrospect-scan.mjs) and commit the result; until then the page runs entirely on the live half, which fills itself from the first visit onward (POST /api/outrospect/refresh).
